text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I needed to go all-in on offense. I needed to attack. So why'd my legs have to go 'n freeze up like dat?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, you're right. With a little rest, I should be
good to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think I catch the faint sound of Tamamo Cross
gritting her teeth.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...If I got the time to mope around, I guess I got
the time to start preppin' for my next race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're right. What's happened, happened. This
attitude isn't gonna get me anywhere. I needa
plan.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I get it. I really do. So why do I still feel so
crappy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross looks up at the ceiling for some
time.
